purpose: Track generated/python runtime and operation-executor Python files whose location alone could be mistaken for generated ownership.
completion_rule: The Python CLI completion gate may reach full-generated-cli-complete only when every entry is rendered-by-command-generation, blocking_full_completion is false for every entry, and command-generation render_outputs produces the same paths.

entries.current_owner: checked-in generated output file with product-specific executable behavior
entries.source_of_truth: not yet represented as implementation-independent operation IR plus codegen-owned primitives
entries.why_blocking: The file lives under generated/python but is not produced by command-generation render_outputs and still contains product-specific executable runtime behavior.
entries.required_resolution: Represent behavior in module-owned IR/contracts plus codegen-owned primitives, then render this file mechanically from command-generation.

entries.required_resolution: Keep generated freshness proof covering this file and migrate the remaining workspace runtime behavior behind IR/primitives before promoting full completion.
